description: Add widgets to your notes like clock, countdown, and quotes.

manifest.description: Add widgets to your notes like clock, countdown, and quotes.
manifest.name: Widgets

name: Widgets

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* 46 feature request flag to hide seconds in the clock widget by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/49
* add increment and start value by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/50
* add show property to countdown by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/51


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/compare/0.0.10...0.0.11

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* add support for +Nd on Countdown widget by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/40
* customize completed label in countdown by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/41
* add id option to Counter to make counters unique if needed by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/42


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/compare/0.0.9...0.0.10

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* widgets as views by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/29
* update(feat): countdown format (m,s,h) by @Rooyca in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/28
* fix typescript errors, imports by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/31

## New Contributors
* @Rooyca made their first contribution in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/28

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/compare/0.0.8...0.0.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Solve #2: ability to change clock to 12 hour format by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/25
* update README, add STYLING document by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/26
* Counter widget by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/27


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/compare/0.0.7...0.0.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix string split on option set by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/12
* update invalid date rendering, don't render dates in the past by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/13
* use duration to calculate date diff by @rafaelveiga in https://github.com/rafaelveiga/obsidian-widgets/pull/14
